text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, thank you for helping me
take care of the flowers!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It proved to be an effective lower-body
workout. I assume this is the secret to
your strong legs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Incorporating new activity into training
regimen… Ideal set amount: three thousand
meters worth of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What?! But that's the same as a
long-distance race! If you water
all those flowers, you'll pass out!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But… Imagine it! Three thousand meters
of flowers! I bet running alongside that
many flowers would be wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
…Beginning simulation. Body temperature
rising. Warm and fuzzy feelings confirmed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This would work both as training
and relaxation… Flowers are indeed
very intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe… If you like, we can water them
together again sometime!♪
